# Roast & Roll — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A boutique coffee shop based in Colorado that offers a cozy, artisan experience with handcrafted coffee beverages alongside freshly made sandwiches and pastries. The 'boutique' identity suggests a curated, intimate atmosphere with attention to quality and a local, community-focused vibe.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover Colorado coziest boutique café. Roast &amp; Roll serves handcrafted specialty coffee, fresh pastries, and artisan sandwiches made with love. Visit us today!

### Menu
https://example.com/menu
Explore our curated menu of handcrafted coffee beverages, freshly baked pastries, and artisan sandwiches. Find your new favorite order at Roast &amp; Roll — quality in every bite.

### About
https://example.com/about
Meet the passionate team behind Roast &amp; Roll, Colorado&#39;s beloved boutique café. Learn how our commitment to quality, craft, and community shapes every cup and every bite we serve.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Looking for the best specialty coffee and sandwiches near you? Get directions, hours, and reach out to Roast &amp; Roll. We&#39;d love to welcome you into our cozy Colorado café.

## Legal & Policy

https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Roast & Roll
A boutique coffee shop based in Colorado that offers a cozy, artisan experience with handcrafted coffee beverages alongside freshly made sandwiches and pastries. The 'boutique' identity suggests a curated, intimate atmosphere with attention to quality and a local, community-focused vibe.

## Services/Products
- coffee
- sandwiches
- pastries

## Target Audience
- Local Coffee Enthusiasts
- Social Media Influencers
- coffee lovers

## Industry
Food & Beverage

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
